<!--
Thanks for contributing to the iGrant.io EUDI Wallet Status Tracker.
Please fill in this template so reviewers can act quickly.
-->

## Summary

What does this PR change in plain English?

## Country (or countries) affected

- [ ] List the country names

## Type of change

- [ ] New history entry (status change)
- [ ] Source addition
- [ ] Correction (please tag with `correction: true` in the JSON)
- [ ] Documentation, methodology or site update
- [ ] Code change

## Sources

Cite at least one verifiable source URL with a date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

- [Title](https://...) (YYYY-MM-DD)

## Checklist

- [ ] House style: British English, no em or en dashes
- [ ] Source dated and linked
- [ ] If a status change, the new history entry is appended (as a new commit, not replacing existing entries)
- [ ] If a correction, marked as `"correction": true` with a one-line rationale
- [ ] `npm run validate-data` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally
